projects.title: SyncIt
projects.summary: My ongoing Blazor side project: a Spotify-integrated queuing app I built end-to-end (useful for parties or running).
projects.challenge: With this being my first proper Blazor project, the main challenge was building familiarity with Blazor.

projects.title: Smart Comparer
projects.summary: My ongoing open-source project: a .NET library for efficient A/B object comparisons across JSON/XML. I maintain it as a reusable library and keep tightening the diffing logic and developer ergonomics.
projects.challenge: Trying to do something new for A/B comparisons and making it efficient and intuitive...
